标题: Kiton 2026 Early Spring wool hooded knit sweater. Deep blue with red and white stripes, sporty yet casual. Made from high-quality wool knit fabric, soft and comfortable. Features a hood and zipper design. Premium luxury fabric with ultra-fine, high-density fibers for exceptional texture and comfort. Smooth, delicate, skin-friendly, and excellent warmth retention. Versatile mature color scheme suits various daily outfits and occasions. Ideal for business and casual wear. Sizes: M-3XL.

Kiton 2026SS Early Spring Long-Sleeve Shirt continues the brand’s classic, bold style. The luxurious stitching is stunning and exudes confidence. Made from premium imported fabric, it is lighter and softer than regular materials, offering an impeccably smooth, skin-friendly feel. The fabric is crisp with strong structure. Woven on high-end jacquard looms, the stitching features a pronounced embossed texture. Details and craftsmanship are flawless. Classic red vintage brand logo buttons enhance the shirt’s premium appeal. Expert tailoring ensures perfectly aligned seams and visual harmony. A versatile piece suitable for all genders and ages. Highly recommended.

Kiton solid color long-sleeve shirt. Founded in 1968 in Naples, Italy, by Ciro Paone, who is obsessively dedicated to quality. The brand’s motto: "One point above perfect." Renowned for classic elegance, Kiton combines traditional craftsmanship, rare fabrics, and exquisite tailoring to bring garments to life. This shirt features Lutai 120-thread count check jacquard fabric, exuding luxury.
